skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
The table shows the results of a survey of 250 people who were asked how often they read a book.

ResponseDailyWeeklyMonthlyRarelyNever
Number of people7080453520

Based on the table, how many people responded either "Rarely" or "Never"?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The number of people who responded “Rarely” (35) plus the number who responded “Never” (20) is 35 + 20 = 55.

Choice B is incorrect. This adds the wrong categories.

Choice C is incorrect. This is the total of “Daily” and “Weekly”.

Choice D is incorrect. This is the total of all categories except “Never.”
